Discover

"My happy place." — Members describe The Abaco Club as an adult summer camp, where generations gather on one of the Bahamas' most pristine private peninsulas.

The Abaco Club

A Paradise for the Soul

Surrounded by the boundless natural beauty of its own private Bahamian peninsula, this extraordinary 500-acre retreat on Great Abaco Island is just a short 35-minute flight from South Florida.

Soft white sands, brilliant turquoise waters, and cheerful resident Abaco parrots create a decidedly different kind of place — where generations come together to play, connect, and find new ways to soothe the soul.

What truly makes this place extraordinary is what it isn't: overcrowded. The natural beauty remains unspoiled, the beaches uncrowded, the azure water yours to discover.

"An adult summer camp — and my happy place."

— Abaco Club Member

Access & Membership

An Exclusive World

The Abaco Club is a private sanctuary managed by The Southworth Group. Renting Cabana 112 is the most accessible — and most affordable — way to experience it.

🌊

Club Members

Full access for members of The Abaco Club, along with reciprocal members of other Southworth Clubs worldwide.

🏡

Cabana Rental

The most reasonable way to visit. Renting Cabana 112 grants access to all club amenities during your stay — rates from $899–$1,100/night.

🤝

Guest Visits

A one-time visit option exists for non-members who aren't accompanied by a member. Property ownership opportunities are also still available through Southworth.

Your Home at The Club

Cabana 112

A thoughtfully designed ~700 sq ft private retreat that comfortably sleeps 2 adults and 1–2 children — with the flexibility to accommodate up to 6 guests.

Rates & Reservations

The Most Affordable Way to Visit

$899–$1,100
per night

Renting Cabana 112 is the most accessible path to experiencing one of the Bahamas' most exclusive private clubs — without a full membership. Full club amenity access included.

  • Access to all Abaco Club facilities & amenities
  • Private Bahamian peninsula — never overcrowded
  • A short 35-minute flight from South Florida
  • Ideal for 2 adults + 1–2 children; sleeps up to 6
  • In-unit laundry for longer stays
  • Spa-quality bath with outdoor shower

Good to know

Non-members may visit once without being accompanied by a member. Property ownership opportunities at The Abaco Club remain available through The Southworth Group.

Getting There

Close Enough to Escape

Great Abaco Island is one of the Bahamas' most accessible islands from the U.S. East Coast — making a long weekend feel like a world away.

✈️

From South Florida

Just a 35-minute flight — or a yacht journey across the Gulf Stream.

🏝️

Great Abaco Island

500 private acres on Winding Bay — one of the most pristine natural settings in the entire Bahamas.

🦜

Resident Abaco Parrots

Cheerful native parrots call the club home year-round, adding to the island's magical, untouched character.

🌊

Private Beaches

Uncrowded. Unspoiled. The azure water and white sands belong — for a week — to you.
